calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-17-2012 Vacated

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Final Judgment; Memo P/A
Off Calendar Sep-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: nancy wang, assistant counsel, bay area air quality management district, 415.749.4971, for plaintiff people of the state of california, by and through the bay area quality managment district; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Final Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions; Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Nancy Wang, Esq., Assistant Counsel, Bay Area Air Quality Management District, Tel. 415.749.4971, appearing for plantiff and moving party.

No other appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, by and through the Bay Area Air Quality Management District's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions - No opposition filed. Motion to deem requests for admissions (Set No. 1) granted. One (1) Order signed for the 2 motions. Pro Tem Judge: Mark Schreiber; Not reported

Notice Of Motion And Motion Top Compel Deft To Answer Pltf'S First Set Of Form Interrogaoriees, Special Interrogatories, And Requests For Production Of Documentrs
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Nancy Wang, Esq., Assistant Counsel, Bay Area Air Quality Management District, Tel. 415.749.4971, appearing for plantiff and moving party.

No other appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, by and through the Bay Area Air Quality Management District's Motion To Compel Defendant To Answer Plaintiff'S First Set Of Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Requests For Production Of Documents - No opposition filed. Motion is granted. Defendant shall serve responses to Plaintiff's First Sets of Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Requests for Production of Documents within ten days of notice of this order. One (1) Order signed for the 2 motions. Pro Tem Judge: Mark Schreiber; Not reported

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
